languages.title: Ulimi
languages.subtitle: Khetha ulimi olusetshenziswe kulo lonke uhlelo lokusebenza.

phone.label: Inombolo yocingo
phone.searchCountry: Cinga izwe, ikhodi, noma isiqalo sokudayela
phone.invalid: Faka inombolo yocingo evumenisekisiwe yezwe elikhethiwe.

auth.onboardingTagline: Umlingani wezokuphepha womuntu ngezikhathi eziphakathi kokuthi "Ngilungile" futhi "Ngidinga usizo."
auth.createSubtitle: Khetha indlela yokungena ngemvume ukuvikela igrafu yakho yokuphepha.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukuqedela ukungena ngemvume. Hlola uxhumano lwakho bese uzama futhi.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Sebenzisa iseshini yokuthuthukiswa kwendawo. I-Native Google Sign-In isebenza ekwakhiweni kwentuthuko.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Bhangqa manje noma uqhubeke bese wengeza kamuva.
auth.northStarBody: I-VL01 egqokekayo ingabangela ukugeleza kokuphepha ngompompi kanye nokucindezela okude.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Umlingani wakho wezokuphepha omnene ebalazweni nasezingcinini.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear kungasiza ngemodi yasekhaya, imodi ye-guardian, imodi ephuthumayo, izingcingo zokuxolisa, nokusekelwa kwezwi.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Isetshenziselwe imephu, izindawo eziyingozi, ukufika okuphephile, kanye SOS mongo.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving ucela indawo ukuze abaqaphi baqonde ukuthi usizo lungadingeka kuphi. Ungakushintsha lokhu kamuva kuzilungiselelo.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Izaziso zisekela ukungena kanye nemicimbi ephuthumayo.
permissions.notificationsBody: Sisebenzisa kuphela izaziso zokuphepha, izibuyekezo eziphuthumayo, nezikhumbuzi ozivumelayo.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving isebenzisa indawo yakho ngemephu yokuphepha, izindawo eziyingozi, ukwabelana okusheshayo, nomongo SOS. Ungakushintsha lokhu kamuva kuzilungiselelo.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ithumela izikhumbuzo zokungena, izibuyekezo eziphuthumayo, kanye neziphakamiso zokuphepha ozivumelayo. Asisebenzisi izaziso zezikhangiso.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving usebenzisa imakrofoni yakho kuphela uma uqala umlingani AI noma ucingo lokuphepha.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving isebenzisa Bluetooth ukubhangqa nobucwebe NorthStar, ukufunda isimo sokuxhumana, futhi kubangele ukugeleza kokuphepha kusuka ku-wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving igcina lokhu kugeleza kutholakala kuzilungiselelo nakudeshibhodi.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Khetha izwi elihambisana nalo elizizwa liphephile kakhulu ukulizwa.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Amapayipi amahlanu angakhuphukela ku-SOS ne-guardian alerts.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Thola isizathu esizwakalayo sokushiya isimo esingakhululekile.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Qala ucingo lomlingani wesikhathi sangempela lapho udinga ukwesekwa.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Zama ukugeleza kokuphepha ku-demo ephansi yengcindezi.

jewelry.noDevices: Azikho izisetshenziswa NorthStar eziseduze ezitholakele okwamanje.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth ukuskena akukwazanga ukuqala. Sicela uzame futhi.
jewelry.scanFailed: Asikwazanga ukuthola ubucwebe obuseduze. Hlola Bluetooth, gcina NorthStar eduze, bese uzama futhi.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth ukuskena akukwazanga ukuqala. Hlola ukufinyelela Bluetooth bese uzama futhi.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Ukufinyelela kwesisetshenziswa esiseduze kuvaliwe. Vumela ukufinyelela Bluetooth kuzilungiselelo, bese uzama futhi.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar kuthathe isikhathi eside kakhulu ukuxhumana. Yisondeze eduze bese uzama futhi.
jewelry.connectFailed: Asikwazanga ukuxhuma NorthStar. Hlola ukuthi ikhokhisiwe futhi iseduze, bese uzama futhi.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Gcina NorthStar ushaje futhi usondele kule foni, bese uhlola futhi.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Hlola ezinye izinketho ezise- NorthStar namaphethelo

home.subtitle: Ideshibhodi yomlingani wokuphepha
home.readyBody: Izwi, imephu, ubucwebe, kanye nabaqaphi kude nompompi owodwa.

map.title: Imephu yokuphepha
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go ukubuka kuqala; Mapbox inikeza ukwakhiwa kwesakhiwo.
map.updateFailed: Asikwazanga ukubuyekeza indawo yakho. Sicela uzame futhi.
map.notRequested: Ukufinyelela kwendawo akucelwanga. Ungayivumela kamuva kusuka kuzilungiselelo.
map.permissionOff: Ukufinyelela kwendawo kuvaliwe. Vumela ku-Izimiso ukugxila kumephu yokuphepha kuwe.
map.timeout: Indawo yakho ithatha isikhathi eside kunalokho obekulindelekile. Hambisa endaweni ethile ngesibonakaliso esicacile bese uzama futhi.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Izindawo ezithembekile ozilondolozayo zizovela lapha ukuze zifinyeleleke ngokushesha.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Qala ucingo noma uthayiphe umlayezo uma usulungile.

history.clearMessage: Lokhu kususa imiyalezo elondoloziwe AI ehambisana nayo kulesi sisetshenziswa.
history.title: Umlando wengxoxo
history.subtitle: AI imiyalezo ehambisana nayo elondoloziwe kulesi sisetshenziswa.
history.emptyMessage: Izingxoxo zakho AI zizovela lapha ngemuva kocingo lwakho lokuqala.
history.loadFailed: Asikwazanga ukufaka umlando wengxoxo. Sicela uzame futhi.
history.clearFailed: Asikwazanga ukucacisa umlando wengxoxo. Sicela uzame futhi.
history.deleteFailed: Asikwazanga ukususa leyo ngxoxo. Sicela uzame futhi.

voices.title: Amazwi ami okuphepha
voices.subtitle: Khetha izwi elizwakala lilungile ukulizwa.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Le sampula yezwi ayikwazanga ukudlalwa. Sicela uzame futhi.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Sebenzisa izimpendulo ezihambisana nazo ezihlanganisiwe uma izifakazelo zomphambo noma Hume zingatholakali.
settings.privacyBody: Thumela noma ususe imininingwane yendawo egcinwe kulesi sisetshenziswa.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Lokhu kususa imininingwane yakho, izimiso, abathintwa abaphuthumayo, umlando wengxoxo, izikhumbuzo zemvume, kanye nesiwombe semvume yendawo kulesi sisetshenziswa.
settings.updateFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukulondoloza lokho kukhetha. Sicela uzame futhi.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Isiwombe sakho sisasebenza. Sicela uzame futhi.

contacts.title: Oxhumana nabo abaphuthumayo
contacts.subtitle: Abantu abathembekile bayatholakala ngesikhathi sokugeleza kwezokuphepha.
contacts.name: Igama
contacts.empty: Akukho oxhumana nabo abaphuthumayo abangeziwe okwamanje.
contacts.emptyTitle: Akukabi khona oxhumana nabo abaphuthumayo okwamanje
contacts.emptyMessage: Engeza umuntu omethembayo ukuze alungele lapho ukugeleza kokuphepha kubadinga.
contacts.removeMessage: Lo muntu ngeke esabonakala ekugelezeni kwakho okuphuthumayo.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukulondoloza lo thintwayo. Hlola imininingwane bese uzama futhi.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukususa lo mxhumanisi. Sicela uzame futhi.

friends.title: Abangane
friends.subtitle: Abaqaphi, izicelo, kanye negrafu ephuthumayo.
friends.emptyMessage: Abangane abathembekile nabaqaphi bazovela lapha uma bengezwa.

emergency.title: Isimo esiphuthumayo SOS
emergency.subtitle: Khuphuka kuphela uma udinga usizo olusheshayo.
emergency.body: Lokhu kuzokwazisa ukugeleza kwakho kokuphepha futhi kulungiselele oxhumana nabo abaphuthumayo.
emergency.quickShareMessage: I-stub yokwabelana ngendawo ilungile. Xhuma iphuzu lokuphela lokwabelana nge-backend ukuthumela izixhumanisi ezibukhoma.

capybearTap.title: Capybear thepha
capybearTap.subtitle: Chofoza kabili NorthStar yakho ukuze uphonse i-orange yokuphepha.
capybearTap.body: Umzila we-Gesture ulungele i-wiring yomcimbi we-BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Ubonakala ungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi. Umlayezo wakho uzothunyelwa uma uxhuma kabusha.
errors.voiceQueued: Umlayezo ulondoloziwe. Izothunyelwa lapho umlingani wezwi ephinda axhumane.
errors.microphone: Ukufinyelela kwemakrofoni kuyadingeka kumakholi ezwi. Ungayivumela kuzilungiselelo, noma uthayiphe umyalezo esikhundleni salokho.
errors.billing: Umlingani wezwi oluku-inthanethi akatholakali okwesikhashana. Ungaqhubeka nomlingani ongaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi.
errors.authentication: Umlingani wezwi akakwazanga ukuqinisekisa lesi siwombe. Ngena ngemvume futhi noma usebenzise umlingani ongaxhunyanisiwe okwamanje.
errors.timeout: Umlingani wezwi wathatha isikhathi eside kakhulu ukuphendula. Hlola uxhumano lwakho bese uzama futhi.
errors.network: Asikwazanga ukufinyelela kumlingani wezwi. Hlola uxhumano lwakho, bese uzama futhi noma uqhubeke ungaxhunyiwe.
errors.genericVoice: Okuthile kwaphazamisa ucingo lwezwi. Zama futhi, noma uqhubeke nomlingani ongaxhunyanisiwe.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving idinga ukufinyelela kumakrofoni ukuze kuphephe futhi AI izingcingo ezihambisana nazo.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving usebenzisa indawo yakho kumephu yokuphepha nezici zokuphepha eziseduze.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving isebenzisa Bluetooth ukuxhuma ubucwebe bakho NorthStar ukuphepha.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Le nketho yokungena ayitholakali kule nguqulo.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Imodi yedemo isebenzisa idatha mbumbulu yasendaweni kuphela. Amasevisi axhunyiwe awaqinisekisiwe, futhi le seshini isethwa kabusha lapho i-app ilayishwa kabusha.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Ikhodi yokuqinisekisa ayivumelekile noma isiphelelwe isikhathi. Cela ikhodi entsha bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Miningi kakhulu imizamo yokungena. Linda kancane, bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Ukuqinisekisa ukungena kuthathe isikhathi eside kakhulu. Hlola ukuxhumeka kwakho bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Asikwazanga ukufinyelela isevisi yokungena. Hlola ukuxhumeka kwakho bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Iseshini yakho isiphelelwe isikhathi. Ngena futhi.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Imephu yokuphepha ayikwazanga ukulayisha. Hlola ukuxhumeka kwakho bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Indawo ebukhoma ayitholakali. Kuboniswa indawo yakho yokugcina elondoloziwe kusukela %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Asikwazanga ukwabelana ngendawo yakho. Hlola imvume yendawo bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Nansi indawo yami yokugcina elondoloziwe, erekhodwe ngo-%{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Ukufinyelela kwe-Bluetooth kuvaliwe. Kuvule kokuthi Izilungiselelo, bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: I-Bluetooth icishiwe. Yivule, bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Ukumatanisa nge-Bluetooth akutholakali kule divayisi noma kule nguqulo.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Asikwazanga ukuthola i-NorthStar. Yigcine iseduze, hlola i-Bluetooth, bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Awekho amadivayisi e-NorthStar aseduze atholakele. Yigcine iseduze bese usesha futhi.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Asikwazanga ukuxhuma ku-NorthStar. Yigcine ishajiwe futhi iseduze, bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Asikwazanga ukulondoloza le ndawo. Zama futhi.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Akekho oxhumana naye wesimo esiphuthumayo obetholakala; alukho ucingo olushayiwe.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Isidayeli sefoni asikwazanga ukuvuleka; alukho ucingo olushayiwe.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Umsizi wezwi akatholakali okwamanje. Zama futhi kamuva noma uqhubeke nomsizi ongaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
